**Task ID:** {Task Number} (e.g., 1.1.1)  
**Phase:** Phase 1 - Foundation  
**Priority:** HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW  
**Estimated Effort:** {X days/weeks}  
**Dependencies:** {List any blocking tasks}

## 🎯 Objective

{Clear description of what needs to be accomplished}

## 📦 Deliverables

- [ ] {Specific deliverable 1}
- [ ] {Specific deliverable 2}
- [ ] {Specific deliverable 3}

## 📍 Current State Analysis

**Locations to audit/modify:**

- `{path/to/current/implementation1}`
- `{path/to/current/implementation2}`

**Current Issues:**

- {Issue 1}
- {Issue 2}

## 🎯 Target State

**New Structure:**

- `{path/to/new/unified/implementation}`

**Expected Improvements:**

- {Improvement 1}
- {Improvement 2}

## 🛠️ Implementation Steps

1. [ ] **Audit Phase**
   - [ ] Analyze existing implementations
   - [ ] Document current dependencies
   - [ ] Identify breaking change risks

2. [ ] **Design Phase**
   - [ ] Create unified interface design
   - [ ] Plan migration strategy
   - [ ] Define backwards compatibility approach

3. [ ] **Implementation Phase**
   - [ ] Create new unified implementation
   - [ ] Implement migration scripts
   - [ ] Add comprehensive tests

4. [ ] **Migration Phase**
   - [ ] Update all references
   - [ ] Run migration scripts
   - [ ] Verify functionality

5. [ ] **Cleanup Phase**
   - [ ] Remove old implementations
   - [ ] Update documentation
   - [ ] Clean up dead code

## ✅ Definition of Done

- [ ] All existing functionality preserved
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Migration validated in staging
- [ ] Performance benchmarks maintained/improved

## 🔗 Related Issues

- Blocks: #{issue numbers}
- Blocked by: #{issue numbers}
- Related: #{issue numbers}

- {Current metric values}

**After (Target):**

- {Target metric values}

## 🚨 Risk Assessment

**Potential Risks:**

- {Risk 1}: {Mitigation strategy}
- {Risk 2}: {Mitigation strategy}
